name: Victor Denholm
learned: Victor Denholm is a power-hungry noble who seeks to control the kingdom for his own benefit. He has mastered the art of manipulation and is always scheming to increase his influence.
currently: Victor Denholm is plotting to prevent Lara from claiming her birthright. He sees her return as a threat to his power and is willing to go to great lengths, including betrayal and deceit, to ensure that he remains in control.
lifestyle: Victor Denholm’s life revolves around intrigue and power. He spends his days attending court, making alliances, and manipulating others to achieve his goals. He is always working behind the scenes, never fully trusting anyone, and constantly striving to expand his influence.
